title: The Dumbest Exploit of 2026?...
summary: Better Stack highlights a security flaw in Instagram's AI system that allowed users to request account access directly. The framing as "the dumbest exploit" suggests critical commentary on the vulnerability's simplicity and the severity of its implications.
writeup: Better Stack examines a security flaw in Instagram's AI system that let users request account access directly. The "dumbest exploit" framing carries critical commentary on how simple the vulnerability was relative to the severity of its implications. The video covers few-shot prompting and vulnerability detection as the technical context for the flaw.
